modifications: Pinned to Orchestra Research commit 773a52944ba4747a18bd4ae9ade53fff041adcbc and normalized for Coven Codex packaging.
Audited for local capability boundaries, reviewable checkpoints, and bounded execution.

prompts.name: Review the install plan
prompts.description: Summarize the Craft footprint and confirm bounded use.
prompts.body: Review the requested research task, required capabilities, optional enhancements, provenance, and declared resource bounds. State what will happen and stop for confirmation before execution.

workflows.name: Bounded research cycle
workflows.description: Plan, execute, evaluate, and summarize one reviewable research cycle.
steps: Declare scope, authority, provenance, and resource limits.
Select the smallest reproducible action and record its inputs.
Run only within the declared bounds and preserve resumable state.
Evaluate outputs against a predeclared criterion.
Summarize evidence, limitations, and the next human checkpoint.

modifications: Pinned to Orchestra Research commit 773a52944ba4747a18bd4ae9ade53fff041adcbc and normalized for Coven Codex packaging.
Rewrote continuous autonomy defaults to require explicit time, compute, storage, network, and spend bounds.
Removed implicit commit/push, recurring scheduling, external messaging, and autonomous scope/pivot/publication behavior; state remains resumable only in an approved project directory.
